entities.name: RURAL ASPIRATIONS
entities.description: Aspirations of people in rural areas that shape their future lives and development trajectories

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD DECISIONS
entities.description: Decisions made by rural individuals regarding their means of survival and economic activity

entities.name: RURAL DEVELOPMENT TRAJECTORIES
entities.description: The paths and directions along which rural development evolves

entities.name: DEVELOPMENT RESEARCH
entities.description: The systematic study and investigation of development projects and approaches

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region providing examples for the analysis of rural aspirations

entities.name: THEORETICAL PERSPECTIVES
entities.description: Conceptual frameworks used to provide insights into the role of aspirations

entities.name: CASE STUDIES
entities.description: Empirical research method used to examine specific instances of rural aspirations

entities.name: BOTTOM UP LOCAL ASPIRATIONS
entities.description: Aspirations for future lives originating from the local rural population

entities.name: TOP DOWN ASPIRATIONS
entities.description: Aspirations formulated as visions for change by external or higher-level planners

entities.name: DEVELOPMENT ACTION
entities.description: Practical implementation and directions for development projects
